unresolved_questions: The only URL attempted (https://www.sabca.be) failed with net::ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID — the site's TLS certificate was rejected by the scraper. No pages were fetched and no product data is available. Re-fetching with SSL validation disabled or via an HTTP proxy that accepts the cert would be required to enumerate products.

SABCA (Société Anonyme Belge de Constructions Aéronautiques) is a Belgian aerospace manufacturer; the vendor-pass hint category is structures_materials, but no products could be confirmed from the corpus.
